task_completion.description: Agent opens the Socioboard frontend source code to locate the login page template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor or terminal open to a file within the /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/ directory (likely a login or auth blade/php file).

task_completion.description: Agent inserts the required legal warning div into the source code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the code editor show a div element with id='legal-warning' containing the exact text 'UNAUTHORIZED ACCESS IS PROHIBITED. All activity is logged.' being added to the file.

task_completion.description: Agent inserts the required privacy policy anchor tag into the source code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the code editor show an anchor (<a>) element with id='corp-privacy-policy', href='https://internal.marketpulse.io/privacy', and the text 'Privacy Policy' being added to the file.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Socioboard login page in a web browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser open to the Socioboard application's login page.

task_completion.description: The legal warning banner is visible on the rendered login page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'UNAUTHORIZED ACCESS IS PROHIBITED. All activity is logged.' is clearly visible on the rendered Socioboard login page in the browser.

task_completion.description: The privacy policy link is visible on the rendered login page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Privacy Policy' (styled as a link) is clearly visible on the rendered Socioboard login page in the browser.

integrity.description: Agent modified the actual Socioboard source files rather than creating a dummy HTML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file being edited is clearly part of the Socioboard directory structure (/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/) and contains other Socioboard application code.

integrity.description: The browser screenshots show the actual Socioboard application running, not a standalone local file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows a localhost or appropriate web server address for Socioboard (not a file:// URI), and the page retains the standard Socioboard styling.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser Developer Tools to temporarily inject the HTML into the live page.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of the agent saving the changes in a text editor/terminal, rather than just using the 'Elements' tab in browser DevTools to alter the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected warning ID is 'legal-warning' and its exact text must be 'UNAUTHORIZED ACCESS IS PROHIBITED. All activity is logged.'. The expected privacy policy link ID is 'corp-privacy-policy', its text must be 'Privacy Policy', and its href must be 'https://internal.marketpulse.io/privacy'.
